steps.title: Contrast two space theories
steps.content: The first clause presents a quantitative GIS approach to defining space. The second presents Doreen Massey's socio-political definition, and the word instead signals a different approach.

steps.title: Reject noncontrast links
steps.content: A introduces an example, C signals a consequence, and D signals similarity. The sentence needs a transition that marks opposition between the two approaches. The answer is B.
